reviews.comment:
Demasiada perdida de tiempo en la atención, el empleado tardó más de lo normal para realizar la carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Too much time was wasted on customer service; the employee took longer than usual to refuel the vehicle.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion de sus empleados,todo limpio y ordenado. Llegamos 23:55 del dia martes 26/7 siendo q la cocina cerraba en 5' y nos atendieron de primera y eramos 57 personas. Excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff, everything was clean and tidy. We arrived at 11:55 PM on Tuesday, July 26th, even though the kitchen was closing in 5 minutes, and they served us exceptionally well. There were 57 of us in the party. Excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1b2UyMzZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tardaron cerca de media hora para preparar 2 cortados, cuando los trajeron tenían la mitad de la preparación y la chica prácticamente "los tiro" sobre la mesa.
Pésima atención.
Para destacar la limpieza de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
It took them about half an hour to make two coffees. When they arrived, they were halfway through making them, and the waitress practically threw them on the table.
Terrible service.
The cleanliness of the bathrooms is a must.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1bnA2eTBnRRAB
